title: Skip Navigation Links

statement.markdown:
## Skip Navigation Links

Build a skip to content link for screen reader and keyboard accessibility.

### Requirements:
1. **Hidden by default**: Skip link starts visually hidden from viewports until it receives keyboard focus.
2. **Content focus**: Focused click shifts active keyboard tracking focus directly to the main element container.
3. **Styling states**: Position the skip link at the top-left of the viewport when focused.

constraints: Must implement visually hidden patterns that display properly on :focus states
Target content container must support tabindex=-1 for javascript focus calls

starterCode.html:
Skip to Content
Home Contact

Main Content Header

Skip link jumps keyfocus here.

gradingCriteria.description: Verify link displays on-screen only when keyboard focused.
Verify clicking shifts keyboard active focus cleanly to the main container.
